name: Red Potatoes with Chives - Menu #1
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Red potatoes; cut into 1-inch pieces
2 tablespoons Fresh chives; minced =OR= Green part of scallion
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick skillet, melt butter over low heat.
2. Add potatoes, salt, and pepper; cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in chives, lemon juice, and lemon zest.
4. Ready to serve in 40 minutes.
